name: agent-workflow-roast
description: A coaching report for your agent workflow, with receipts.

interface.shortDescription: A coaching report for your agent workflow, with receipts
interface.longDescription: Analyze recent local agent sessions and optional memory summaries to surface workflow patterns, friction signals, prompt-quality metrics, practical improvements, and copy-ready guidance.
defaultPrompt: Run an Agent Workflow Roast for the last 7 days
Show the agent workflow friction points from the last 30 days
Export Agent Workflow Roast as markdown
